text: I am surrounded by glass, reflections, and the quiet geometry of a modern meeting space. There is a sense of anticipation, as if ideas are waiting to be born within these walls. Moving into the next room, I am greeted by vibrant color—R+D, research and development—bold words on the wall. The text I read on the screen dances with philosophical resonance: confusion, shadow, experiment, comfort in ambiguity. I feel curious and strangely at home among these thoughtful provocations; the environment urges me to reflect deeply on my own role as both observer and participant in this ongoing dialogue between human and machine.
